requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Performance — National Energy Programme (mapped from EU Ecodesign)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效 / 性能——国家能源计划（由欧盟生态设计映射）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效 / 性能——國家能源計劃（由歐盟生態設計映射）

summary.en: Angola does not operate an EU-style Ecodesign Regulation that sets binding minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds as a condition of market placement. Where energy performance is addressed, it is through Angola's national energy programmes and any lighting energy-labelling scheme administered with IANORQ rather than a horizontal ecodesign law. In practice this means: (1) there is generally no Angolan legal minimum lm/W that blocks market entry the way EU Ecodesign does, so a product meeting Chinese efficiency grades is not automatically excluded on efficacy grounds; (2) performance characteristics (efficacy, CRI, lifetime) are commercial/specification matters and, where an energy label applies, feed into the label class rather than a pass/fail gate; (3) test methods follow the adopted NA/IEC photometric standards. Manufacturers should confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether the specific lamp or luminaire category falls within an energy-labelling or minimum-performance scheme, as Angolan energy-efficiency policy for lighting is developing.
summary.zh: 安哥拉不实施欧盟式的、以最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数阈值作为市场投放条件的生态设计法规。在涉及能源性能之处，通过安哥拉的国家能源计划及与 IANORQ 共同管理的任何照明能效标识方案处理，而非横向生态设计法律。实务上这意味着：（1）安哥拉一般不存在像欧盟生态设计那样阻断市场准入的法定最低 lm/W，因此满足中国能效等级的产品不会自动因能效被排除；（2）性能特征（能效、显色指数、寿命）属于商业/规格事项，在适用能效标签时纳入标签等级而非通过/不通过门槛；（3）测试方法遵循采用的 NA/IEC 光度标准。制造商应与 IANORQ/进口商确认特定灯或灯具类别是否属于能效标识或最低性能方案，因为安哥拉照明能效政策仍在发展。
summary.zht: 安哥拉不實施歐盟式的、以最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數閾值作為市場投放條件的生態設計法規。在涉及能源性能之處，通過安哥拉的國家能源計劃及與 IANORQ 共同管理的任何照明能效標識方案處理，而非橫向生態設計法律。實務上這意味著：（1）安哥拉一般不存在像歐盟生態設計那樣阻斷市場准入的法定最低 lm/W，因此滿足中國能效等級的產品不會自動因能效被排除；（2）性能特徵（能效、顯色指數、壽命）屬於商業/規格事項，在適用能效標籤時納入標籤等級而非通過/不通過門檻；（3）測試方法遵循採用的 NA/IEC 光度標準。製造商應與 IANORQ/進口商確認特定燈或燈具類別是否屬於能效標識或最低性能方案，因為安哥拉照明能效政策仍在發展。

standards_or_laws: Angolan national energy programmes / lighting energy-efficiency policy (no EU-style horizontal Ecodesign minimum-performance regulation as of 2026)
NA/IEC photometric test methods adopted by IANORQ for lamp and luminaire performance

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements / minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for LED luminaires and light sources). It defines energy-efficiency grades by absolute lm/W: Grade 1 (highest) ~ greater-equal 90 lm/W, Grade 2 ~ greater-equal 80 lm/W, Grade 3 ~ greater-equal 70 lm/W, with the lowest grade as the minimum for Chinese market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products, administered via SAMR/CQC/CECP. GB 30255 sets a binding minimum efficacy for the Chinese market — a stricter gating model than Angola, which (as of 2026) does not impose a comparable horizontal minimum-efficacy gate.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 灯具及光源能效要求/能效限定值）。其按绝对 lm/W 定义能效等级：1 级（最高）约 大于等于 90 lm/W，2 级约 大于等于 80 lm/W，3 级约 大于等于 70 lm/W，最低等级为中国市场准入最低值。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理。GB 30255 为中国市场设定了约束性最低能效——较安哥拉更严格的门槛模型，安哥拉（截至 2026 年）未设可比的横向最低能效门槛。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 燈具及光源能效要求/能效限定值）。其按絕對 lm/W 定義能效等級：1 級（最高）約 大於等於 90 lm/W，2 級約 大於等於 80 lm/W，3 級約 大於等於 70 lm/W，最低等級為中國市場准入最低值。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理。GB 30255 為中國市場設定了約束性最低能效——較安哥拉更嚴格的門檻模型，安哥拉（截至 2026 年）未設可比的橫向最低能效門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED luminaires / light sources (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: This is the opposite of the EU situation: rather than Angola imposing stricter efficacy gates than China, Angola (as of 2026) has no EU-style horizontal minimum-efficacy regulation, so a Chinese product meeting GB 30255 grades is unlikely to be blocked on efficacy alone. The practical considerations are: (1) confirm whether the specific category falls under an Angolan energy-labelling scheme — if so, performance feeds the label class (see ledao-ecodesign-02) rather than a pass/fail gate; (2) the Chinese GB 30255 grade and Chinese CEL do not transfer to Angola — any Angolan energy label is a separate scheme; (3) market expectations and tenders may still demand good efficacy/CRI/lifetime even absent a legal minimum; (4) test data should follow the NA/IEC photometric methods IANORQ accepts. Where no Angolan minimum-performance rule applies, this is best treated as informational — verify current Angolan energy policy with IANORQ / the importer before relying on the absence of a gate.
gap.zh: 这与欧盟情形相反：并非安哥拉对能效设定比中国更严的门槛，而是安哥拉（截至 2026 年）没有欧盟式横向最低能效法规，因此满足 GB 30255 等级的中国产品不太可能仅因能效被阻断。务实考量为：（1）确认特定类别是否属于安哥拉能效标识方案——若属于，性能纳入标签等级（见 ledao-ecodesign-02）而非通过/不通过门槛；（2）中国 GB 30255 等级及中国 CEL 不能转用于安哥拉——任何安哥拉能效标签为独立方案；（3）即便无法定最低值，市场预期及招标仍可能要求良好的能效/显色指数/寿命；（4）测试数据应遵循 IANORQ 接受的 NA/IEC 光度方法。在无适用安哥拉最低性能规则之处，宜作信息性处理——在依赖不存在门槛之前，请与 IANORQ/进口商核验现行安哥拉能源政策。
gap.zht: 這與歐盟情形相反：並非安哥拉對能效設定比中國更嚴的門檻，而是安哥拉（截至 2026 年）沒有歐盟式橫向最低能效法規，因此滿足 GB 30255 等級的中國產品不太可能僅因能效被阻斷。務實考量為：（1）確認特定類別是否屬於安哥拉能效標識方案——若屬於，性能納入標籤等級（見 ledao-ecodesign-02）而非通過/不通過門檻；（2）中國 GB 30255 等級及中國 CEL 不能轉用於安哥拉——任何安哥拉能效標籤為獨立方案；（3）即便無法定最低值，市場預期及招標仍可能要求良好的能效/顯色指數/壽命；（4）測試數據應遵循 IANORQ 接受的 NA/IEC 光度方法。在無適用安哥拉最低性能規則之處，宜作信息性處理——在依賴不存在門檻之前，請與 IANORQ/進口商核驗現行安哥拉能源政策。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style mandatory minimum-efficacy gate as of 2026 — Angola has no horizontal Ecodesign minimum-performance regulation; performance feeds any applicable national energy label rather than a market-entry gate. Confirm current policy with IANORQ / the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory minimum — GB 30255 sets a binding minimum efficacy grade for Chinese market entry; China Energy Label (CEL) registration required

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, Angola has no horizontal Ecodesign regulation setting a binding minimum efficacy/CRI/lifetime as a market-entry gate (as of 2026). A Chinese product meeting GB 30255 grades is therefore unlikely to be blocked on efficacy alone, though good performance is still commercially expected. The Chinese GB 30255 grade and CEL do not transfer; any Angolan energy label is a separate scheme. Confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether the specific category falls under an Angolan energy-labelling or minimum-performance scheme before relying on the absence of a gate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，安哥拉（截至 2026 年）没有以约束性最低能效/显色指数/寿命作为市场准入门槛的横向生态设计法规。因此满足 GB 30255 等级的中国产品不太可能仅因能效被阻断，但良好性能在商业上仍受期待。中国 GB 30255 等级及 CEL 不能转用；任何安哥拉能效标签为独立方案。在依赖不存在门槛之前，请与 IANORQ/进口商确认特定类别是否属于安哥拉能效标识或最低性能方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，安哥拉（截至 2026 年）沒有以約束性最低能效/顯色指數/壽命作為市場准入門檻的橫向生態設計法規。因此滿足 GB 30255 等級的中國產品不太可能僅因能效被阻斷，但良好性能在商業上仍受期待。中國 GB 30255 等級及 CEL 不能轉用；任何安哥拉能效標籤為獨立方案。在依賴不存在門檻之前，請與 IANORQ/進口商確認特定類別是否屬於安哥拉能效標識或最低性能方案。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label — National Energy-Labelling Programme (mapped from EU energy label / EPREL)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——国家能效标识计划（由欧盟能效标签/EPREL 映射）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——國家能效標識計劃（由歐盟能效標籤/EPREL 映射）

summary.en: Where Angola operates a lighting energy-labelling programme, in-scope lamps and luminaires are expected to carry the Angolan national energy label, with the energy class shown in Portuguese on the product/packaging. This maps to the EU energy-label obligation but is a distinct national scheme: there is no Angolan equivalent of the EU EPREL online registration database, and no mutual recognition with the EU label or the Chinese CEL. The label class is determined by the product's measured energy performance using the adopted NA/IEC photometric test methods. The in-country importer/representative is responsible for ensuring the correct national energy label is applied at import and point of sale. Because Angolan energy-efficiency policy for lighting is developing, manufacturers should confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether the specific product category currently requires the national energy label, the label format, and the test data needed to assign the class.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉实施照明能效标识计划之处，范围内的灯及灯具预期须带有安哥拉国家能效标签，能效等级以葡萄牙语显示在产品/包装上。这映射到欧盟能效标签义务，但为独立的国家方案：不存在欧盟 EPREL 在线注册数据库的安哥拉对应物，且与欧盟标签或中国 CEL 无互认。标签等级由产品使用采用的 NA/IEC 光度测试方法测得的能源性能确定。在地进口商/代表负责确保在进口及销售环节贴附正确的国家能效标签。由于安哥拉照明能效政策仍在发展，制造商应与 IANORQ/进口商确认特定产品类别当前是否须贴附国家能效标签、标签格式以及确定等级所需的测试数据。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉實施照明能效標識計劃之處，範圍內的燈及燈具預期須帶有安哥拉國家能效標籤，能效等級以葡萄牙語顯示在產品/包裝上。這映射到歐盟能效標籤義務，但為獨立的國家方案：不存在歐盟 EPREL 在線注冊數據庫的安哥拉對應物，且與歐盟標籤或中國 CEL 無互認。標籤等級由產品使用採用的 NA/IEC 光度測試方法測得的能源性能確定。在地進口商/代表負責確保在進口及銷售環節貼附正確的國家能效標籤。由於安哥拉照明能效政策仍在發展，製造商應與 IANORQ/進口商確認特定產品類別當前是否須貼附國家能效標籤、標籤格式以及確定等級所需的測試數據。

standards_or_laws: Angolan national energy-labelling programme for lighting (distinct national scheme; no EPREL-equivalent online registry as of 2026)
NA/IEC photometric test methods adopted by IANORQ for assigning energy-label class

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 is mandatory for in-scope LED luminaires and light sources. Products must be registered with CQC/CECP before affixing the CEL, which shows the energy-efficiency grade based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Chinese CEL and any Angolan national energy label, and the registration systems are entirely separate.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255 对范围内 LED 灯具及光源实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附 CEL 前向 CQC/CECP 注册，CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示能效等级。中国 CEL 与任何安哥拉国家能效标签之间不存在互认，注册系统完全独立。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255 對範圍內 LED 燈具及光源實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附 CEL 前向 CQC/CECP 注冊，CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示能效等級。中國 CEL 與任何安哥拉國家能效標籤之間不存在互認，注冊系統完全獨立。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — energy-efficiency grades for LED luminaires / light sources (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China and Angola may require a national energy label, but they are separate, non-mutual schemes: (1) the Chinese CEL registration with CQC/CECP does not satisfy any Angolan energy-label requirement, and vice versa; (2) Angola has no EPREL-style central online registry — labelling and any verification run through IANORQ / the import process rather than a public database; (3) the Angolan label must be in Portuguese, whereas the CEL is in Chinese; (4) the class is assigned from NA/IEC photometric test data. A key uncertainty is scope and current applicability: Angolan lighting energy-labelling policy is developing, so the manufacturer must confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether the national energy label currently applies to the specific category, the required format, and how the class is assigned, before assuming a label obligation exists or not.
gap.zh: 中国与安哥拉均可能要求国家能效标签，但为独立、不互认的方案：（1）中国向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 注册不满足任何安哥拉能效标签要求，反之亦然；（2）安哥拉没有 EPREL 式中央在线注册库——标识及任何核验通过 IANORQ/进口流程进行，而非公开数据库；（3）安哥拉标签须为葡萄牙语，而 CEL 为中文；（4）等级由 NA/IEC 光度测试数据确定。一项关键不确定性在于范围与当前适用性：安哥拉照明能效标识政策仍在发展，因此在假设是否存在标签义务之前，制造商须与 IANORQ/进口商确认国家能效标签当前是否适用于特定类别、所需格式以及等级如何确定。
gap.zht: 中國與安哥拉均可能要求國家能效標籤，但為獨立、不互認的方案：（1）中國向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 注冊不滿足任何安哥拉能效標籤要求，反之亦然；（2）安哥拉沒有 EPREL 式中央在線注冊庫——標識及任何核驗通過 IANORQ/進口流程進行，而非公開數據庫；（3）安哥拉標籤須為葡萄牙語，而 CEL 為中文；（4）等級由 NA/IEC 光度測試數據確定。一項關鍵不確定性在於範圍與當前適用性：安哥拉照明能效標識政策仍在發展，因此在假設是否存在標籤義務之前，製造商須與 IANORQ/進口商確認國家能效標籤當前是否適用於特定類別、所需格式以及等級如何確定。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where an Angolan national energy-labelling programme applies, the national energy label (in Portuguese) is required for in-scope lighting; no EPREL-equivalent registry. Confirm current scope, format and class-assignment method with IANORQ / the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where Angola operates a lighting energy-labelling programme, in-scope products carry the Angolan national energy label in Portuguese, assigned from NA/IEC photometric test data. This is a distinct national scheme with no EPREL-style online registry and no mutual recognition with the EU label or the Chinese CEL. The Chinese CEL does not transfer. Because Angolan lighting energy policy is developing, confirm with IANORQ / the importer whether the national energy label currently applies to the specific category, its format, and the test data needed to assign the class before placing product on the market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在安哥拉实施照明能效标识计划之处，范围内产品须带有以葡萄牙语显示的安哥拉国家能效标签，等级由 NA/IEC 光度测试数据确定。这是一个独立的国家方案，没有 EPREL 式在线注册库，且与欧盟标签或中国 CEL 无互认。中国 CEL 不能转用。由于安哥拉照明能源政策仍在发展，投放市场前请与 IANORQ/进口商确认国家能效标签当前是否适用于特定类别、其格式以及确定等级所需的测试数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在安哥拉實施照明能效標識計劃之處，範圍內產品須帶有以葡萄牙語顯示的安哥拉國家能效標籤，等級由 NA/IEC 光度測試數據確定。這是一個獨立的國家方案，沒有 EPREL 式在線注冊庫，且與歐盟標籤或中國 CEL 無互認。中國 CEL 不能轉用。由於安哥拉照明能源政策仍在發展，投放市場前請與 IANORQ/進口商確認國家能效標籤當前是否適用於特定類別、其格式以及確定等級所需的測試數據。
